# Devs Store

> An online storefront for quality products, accessories, and developer items.

## About

Devs Store is an e-commerce platform offering a curated selection of products across multiple categories and brands. We provide a seamless shopping experience with features including product search, filtering by brand/category/type, customer reviews, wishlists, and secure checkout.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://sputnikdevsdemo.store/): Browse featured products, new arrivals, and best sellers
- [Products](https://sputnikdevsdemo.store/products): Full product catalog with search, filters, and sorting
- [Contact](https://sputnikdevsdemo.store/contact): Get in touch with our team
- [FAQ](https://sputnikdevsdemo.store/faq): Frequently asked questions about orders, shipping, and returns
- [Return Policy](https://sputnikdevsdemo.store/policy): Our return and refund policy

## Features

- Product browsing with advanced filtering (brand, category, type, rating)
- Product reviews and ratings
- Wishlist functionality
- Secure checkout with multiple payment gateways
- Order tracking
- AI-powered product recommendations
- AI-powered review summaries

## Contact

Visit our [Contact page](https://sputnikdevsdemo.store/contact) for phone, email, and office address details.
